entities.description: The productivity of the crop measured in kg ha-1

entities.description: The girth of the panicle measured in cm

entities.description: The height of the plant measured in cm

entities.description: The length of the panicle measured in cm

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The number of days until 50% of the plants flower

entities.description: The weight of 1000 grains measured in g

entities.name: NUMBER OF PRODUCTIVE TILLERS

entities.description: Statistical method used to determine relationships between yield and yield component characters

entities.name: PATH ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical method used to determine direct and indirect effects of traits on grain yield

entities.name: DIALLEL CROSS
entities.description: A breeding method used to formulate hybrids by crossing parental lines excluding reciprocals

entities.name: SELECTION INDICES
entities.description: Traits used as criteria for selecting superior parental lines and hybrids

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: The systematic process of improving crop productivity through selection and crossing
